quiz.title: Algebra-1 Unit 6 Quiz 6
quiz.subtitle: Solving AND Compound Inequalities
quiz.subject: Algebra 1
quiz.topic: Solving and Graphing Inequalities Joined by AND (Intersection)

questions.question: Solve: $x > 2$ AND $x ‚Č§ 7$
questions.explanation: AND means intersection (both must be true). $x > 2$ AND $x ‚Č§ 7$ gives $2 < x ‚Č§ 7$. Graph: open at 2, closed at 7, shade between.

questions.question: Solve: $-3 ‚Č§ 2x + 1 < 5$
questions.explanation: Solve each part: $-3 ‚Č§ 2x + 1$ ‚Üí $-4 ‚Č§ 2x$ ‚Üí $-2 ‚Č§ x$. AND $2x + 1 < 5$ ‚Üí $2x < 4$ ‚Üí $x < 2$. Combine: $-2 ‚Č§ x < 2$.

questions.question: Solve: $4 < 3x - 2 ‚Č§ 10$
questions.explanation: Solve each: $4 < 3x - 2$ ‚Üí $6 < 3x$ ‚Üí $2 < x$. AND $3x - 2 ‚Č§ 10$ ‚Üí $3x ‚Č§ 12$ ‚Üí $x ‚Č§ 4$. Combine: $2 < x ‚Č§ 4$.

questions.question: Solve: $0 ‚Č§ \frac{x + 3}{2} < 4$
questions.explanation: Solve each: $0 ‚Č§ \frac{x+3}{2}$ ‚Üí $0 ‚Č§ x+3$ ‚Üí $-3 ‚Č§ x$. AND $\frac{x+3}{2} < 4$ ‚Üí $x+3 < 8$ ‚Üí $x < 5$. Combine: $-3 ‚Č§ x < 5$.

questions.question: Which number line shows $-1 ‚Č§ x < 3$?
questions.explanation: $-1 ‚Č§ x$ means closed at -1 (included). $x < 3$ means open at 3 (excluded). Shade between them.

questions.question: Solve: $5 ‚Č§ 2x + 1 ‚Č§ 9$
questions.explanation: Solve each: $5 ‚Č§ 2x + 1$ ‚Üí $4 ‚Č§ 2x$ ‚Üí $2 ‚Č§ x$. AND $2x + 1 ‚Č§ 9$ ‚Üí $2x ‚Č§ 8$ ‚Üí $x ‚Č§ 4$. Combine: $2 ‚Č§ x ‚Č§ 4$.

questions.question: Solve: $x ‚Č• -2$ AND $x < 1$
questions.explanation: AND means both true. $x ‚Č• -2$ AND $x < 1$ gives $-2 ‚Č§ x < 1$. Graph: closed at -2, open at 1, shade between.

questions.question: Which compound inequality matches the graph?
questions.explanation: Closed at 0 means $‚Č• 0$. Open at 5 means $< 5$. Shaded between means AND. So $0 ‚Č§ x < 5$.

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You master AND compound inequalities: solving, graphing, and understanding intersection.
scoreMessages.70: Strong skills! Focus on: 1) Solving each inequality separately, 2) Finding the overlap (intersection), 3) Careful with negative coefficients.
scoreMessages.50: Good progress. Practice: 1) Solve each part of compound inequality, 2) Find common solution (overlap), 3) Graph with correct open/closed circles.
scoreMessages.0: AND means both must be true (intersection). Solve each inequality separately, then find numbers that satisfy BOTH. Graph with appropriate circles.
